name: Benchy Award
description: Resin trophy of classic 3D Benchy boat for your first calibration print.

name: Motor Award
description: 12 cm tall brushed aluminum trophy shaped like an Edison Model M motor; awarded to early buyers.

name: Rocket Award
description: 15 cm tall brushed aluminum rocket trophy awarded for printing your first model rocket.

name: Rocketeer Award
description: 12 cm aluminum rocket trophy for your first model rocket launch.

name: Completionist Award
description: 15 cm aluminum trophy etched 'Completionist 2023'; reward for finishing every quest on 2023-01-01.

name: Tree Hugger Award
description: 12 cm bamboo trophy laser-engraved with a tree; awarded for converting dCarbon to dOffset.

name: Completionist Award II core
description: Freshly printed PLA core of the Completionist Award II, ready for sanding and a press-fit nameplate.

name: Completionist Award II nameplate
description: Engraved PLA plate with the award date and serial, sized to seat flush in the trophy core.

name: Completionist Award II (polished)
description: Award wiped clean of dust and fingerprints, ready for display photos.

name: Completionist Award II (displayed)
description: Award staged on a dusted shelf with backlighting logged for future inspections.

name: Completionist Award II
description: 12 cm PLA trophy dated 2023-06-30; printed core and nameplate bonded for finishing and display.

name: Hydro Award
description: 10 cm aluminum droplet trophy engraved 'Hydration Hero'; reward for hauling ten buckets to dChat.

name: V2 Upgrade Trophy
description: Awarded for migrating a v2 localStorage save to the v3 IndexedDB format.

name: GitHub Link-Up Trophy
description: A celebratory Octocat badge awarded for securely connecting GitHub and enabling cloud sync.

name: Test Suite Triumph Trophy
description: Anodized aluminum trophy for a clean, tested-and-verified CI-parity run.

name: Completionist Award III lattice spine
description: A precision 3D printed lattice spine with triangular trusses, hidden cable channels, and keyed mounting tabs that lock into the award's wood base and electronics bay.

name: Completionist Award III wood base
description: Hand-cut and sanded pine base with chamfered edges, routed channels for wiring, and a matte protective finish designed to hold the lattice spine and planter module without wobble.

name: Completionist Award III electronics harness
description: Integrated low-voltage harness featuring an Arduino control node, LED status ring branch, servo branch, heat-shrunk solder joints, and labeled debug header leads for diagnostics.

name: Completionist Award III planter module
description: Compact living top-module with a micro planter cup, rooted basil seedling, moisture-retaining medium, and capillary feed path for low-flow nutrient watering.

name: Completionist Award III integrated assembly
description: Pre-final assembled trophy stack combining the printed lattice, finished pine base, electronics harness, planter module, and centered Completionist Award II heritage core.

name: Completionist Award III
description: A 28 cm mixed-material capstone trophy: matte-black 3D printed lattice tower rising from a hand-finished pine base, wrapped with visible copper-trace styling and a subtle LED halo, with a servo-actuated kinetic vane near the top, a clear front window framing the embedded Completionist Award II as a historical core, and a living basil planter crown with textured growth medium and micro-irrigation channeling. The piece should read as handcrafted yet high-tech: clean chamfers, precision fasteners, tidy heat-shrunk wiring runs, warm wood grain contrast against polymer geometry, and soft studio lighting that highlights both engineering detail and organic growth.
